description:
Join us on Saturday, March 29th at 6 PM as we celebrate 2 amazing years of community, good vibes, and endless shells!

🎶 Live Music

Come raise a shell with us and let’s make this anniversary one to remember! See you there! 💚

title: Wednesday Smash Tournament
description:
Tournament

Join us every other Wednesday Night 8:30pm at Coastal Kava for an epic Super Smash Bros. tournament! Whether you’re a seasoned pro or just looking to have fun, this event is the perfect place to test your skills, meet fellow players, and enjoy the best kava in town.

📅 When: Every other Wednesday 8:30pm
📍 Where: Coastal Kava, West Palm Beach
💰 Entry Fee: $10.   - must purchase 2 items at venue 
🏆 1st Place - 

Bring your A-game, grab a shell, and let’s smash!

title: Tibe After Dark
description:
Get ready for Tribe After Dark On State - the DJ's takeover! Bring Your Vibe, or Bring Your Skills.  

Want to rock the crowd or just jam for fun? Whether you're a seasoned DJ or just getting started, the stage is yours!

Step up for a 15-20 min set and show us what you've got!

Once the open desk close, Tribe After Dark residents DJs will take over with the freshest, most electrifying beat!

Open Decks featuring DJ Everythingsmade, and DJ @deluludubz!

DM @everythingsmade to request a slot.

Best DJ set gets a slot at the next rave!

Exclusive Elixirs by Tribe Chief own - a taste you won't find anywhere else!

Raffles, Prizes, and more surprises await!

See you all at Tribe After Dark.

title: Melodic Mondays
description: Every Monday, Melodic Mondays brings live performers to Passage Kava Lounge, filling the space with incredible music and even better vibes. Come be part of a night you won’t forget!

title: Live Music With Choice
description: Tuesday nights from 7 to 9, Choice sets the tone at Passage Kava Lounge with soft, beautiful music that weaves perfectly into the atmosphere. Settle in and enjoy.

title: Trivia Night With Chris
description:
Every Wednesday at 7 PM, join us for Trivia Night at Passage Kava Lounge, hosted by the always-entertaining Chris.
Expect clever questions, good conversation, and a relaxed atmosphere where curiosity thrives.
Whether you come solo or with a team, you’ll enjoy a night of fun facts, great drinks, and maybe even a prize or two.
It’s free to play — just bring your brain and your favorite drink in hand.

title: Karaoke Night With Holding
description:
Every Thursday at 7 PM, it’s Karaoke Night — hosted by Holding.
Whether you’re a seasoned singer or just in it for the fun, this is your moment to grab the mic and shine.
Expect good vibes, great drinks, and a crowd that’s always cheering you on.
No judgment, just music, laughter, and a night to remember

title: Live Music
description: Every Saturday from 3 to 5 PM, enjoy live music at Passage Kava Lounge.\nUnwind with smooth afternoon sounds from talented local artists, paired with your favorite drink in hand.\nIt’s the perfect way to ease into the weekend — relaxed, refreshing, and just the right vibe.

title: Underground House Music Birthday Party!
description:
Sip, Connect, Relax and Repeat! Join us this Saturday May 3rd from 9PM to 2AM as we celebrate the birthday of one of our tribe family, the infamous and internationally known, kava bender, Max Mucci.

We have a ton of DJ's, Vendors and all kinds of specials.  You're not gonna want to miss this!

There's always a vibe at Tribe, so come on our and be part of it! BULA!

title: Movie nights on Mondays
description:
Movie Nights Every Monday in May!

Kick off your week the right way — with Movie Night Mondays at Island Vibes!

Every Monday in May, we’re turning down the lights and turning up the vibes with a new movie each week.
From cult classics to fan favorites, grab your shell, sip something smooth, and enjoy a chill night with the crew.

Free to watch. Vibes guaranteed.
Movies start at sundown — come early for the best seat and your favorite shell.

title: Dart Tournament
description: Friday May 9th join us for the Dart Tournament

title: Smash Brothers tournament
description: May 17th Join us for a Smash Brothers Tournament!

title: Double Reward points
description:
Double Points Mondays — All May Long!

Mondays just got way more rewarding at Island Vibes!

All through May, earn DOUBLE reward points every Monday when you sip with us.
That means twice the points, twice the love, and a faster track to your next free shell or special perk.

It’s our way of saying thanks for vibing with us — all month long.

Drink more. Earn faster. Feel the vibes.

title: Happy hour all day!
description:
Customer Appreciation Sundays at Island Vibes!

Every Sunday, we’re showing love to the ones who make the vibes possible — YOU!

Join us for All Day Happy Hour as a thank-you for being part of the Island Vibes family.
Sip your favorites, kick back with the crew, and soak up the good energy every Sunday — it’s our way of giving back to our amazing customers.

Great drinks. Chill vibes. All day long.

Because at Island Vibes, every Sunday is for the people.

title: Trivia Night!
description: Every Monday night we do 3 rounds of trivia hosted by Miriam Martinez. Come play for a chance to win a $30 bar tab each round.

title: Nerd Out Night!
description: Join Daphne in a night filled with games. We’ll have everything from Nintendo Switch, Oculus, Ping Pong, Bartender Bingo, & more!!

title: Movie Night!!
description: Every Wednesday night we play a movie chosen from Miriam’s well curated list.

title: Poker Tournament!!!
description: Every Friday night we host a poker tournament. Winner takes home a $30 bar tab.

title: Billiards Tournament!!!
description: Every Saturday night Jeffrey hosts a poker tournament. Winner takes home a $50 bar tab.

title: Poker Night
description: Ready to roll the dice and win big? Join us for poker night with a professional dealer from the Hard Rock Casino! Mention this event post for a free drink.

title: SUPER SMASH BROS
description:
Super Smash Bros. Tournament and it’s gonna be epic! Bring your best fighter and battle it out for glory, bragging rights, and some tasty rewards.

🥇 1st Place: $30 Bar Tab
🥈 2nd Place: $10 Bar Tab

Grab your controller, bring the hype, and let’s see who reigns supreme!
Let’s smash, sip, and score!

title: PAJAMA MOVE NIGHT PARTY
description:
🎬 Monday Pajama Party & Movie Night!
Kick off your week the cozy way at Kava Point! Slip into your comfiest PJs and join us for a laid-back Pajama Party + Movie Night starting at 9PM.

🛌 Cozy vibes
🎥 Big screen fun
🍵 Chill sips all night

Bring a blanket, bring a friend, and let’s get comfy!

title: AIR HOCKEY
description:
🏒 Wednesday Night Air Hockey Tournament!
Think you’ve got the fastest hands at Kava Point? Prove it this Wednesday night and battle it out in our Air Hockey Tournament!

🥇 1st Place: $30 Bar Tab
🥈 2nd Place: $10 Bar Tab

The puck drops at 9PM — bring your A-game, bring the heat, and let’s make it a night to remember!

title: POOL TOURNAMENT
description:
🎱 Thursday Night Pool Tournament!
Chalk up and show off your skills at Kava Point’s Thursday Night Pool Tournament! Whether you’re a shark or just in it for fun, it’s your shot to win big.

🥇 1st Place: $30 Bar Tab
🥈 2nd Place: $10 Bar Tab

Rack ‘em up at 9PM — good vibes, great shots, and even better sips await!

title: LIVE MUSIC + LADIES NIGHT
description:
🎶 Friday Night Vibes at Kava Point!
Get ready for a night of live music and good energy as Chris Clark & Good Rabbit take the stage starting at 9PM!

💃 It’s also Ladies Night – special deals and great vibes just for the gals.
🎤 Live tunes
🍹 Tasty drinks
🔥 All-around good times

Don’t miss the fun — grab your crew and come dance the night away!

title: SATURDAY POKER NIGHT
description:
♠️ Saturday Night Poker at Kava Point!
Think you’ve got the best poker face? Come test your luck and skill at our Saturday Night Poker Game starting at 9PM!

💰 Buy-in: Just purchase a drink to play
🏆 Prize: Winner takes home a $40 bar tab

Drinks, cards, and good vibes — don’t fold on this one!

title: FLOW FRIDAYS
description:
🕗 8PM – 3AM 

​🌕 No formal structure. Just music, fire, flow, and freedom.

​🧘‍♀️ Ground. Move. Express. Connect.


​DM @KayfKava to perform, teach, or vend.

​

​🎧 Guest DJs & Tribal House Beats

​🌴 Immersive Visuals + Glow Flow

​💃 Flow Artists | 🎧 Live DJ Sets | 🎭 Open Vibes | 🎤Karaoke | Food truck with Vegan options

​✨ Dress Code: FIRE!! Come with the rizz!!!

title: Thursday Music Night with DJ Maxx
description:
Get ready to vibe this Thursday night at House of Tanoa with smooth beats, chill vibes, and good company. Join DJ Maxx as he spins your favorite tracks and takes song requests all night long.

Whether you’re sipping on your favorite kava or just hanging out with friends, this is the perfect midweek reset. Relax, unwind, and let the music take over.

🎶 Chill music. Great drinks. Even better vibes.

title: 🎬 Movie Night
description: Kick back with friends, sip your shell, and enjoy a cozy movie night on the big screen.

title: 🎮 Video Game Night
description: Controller in one hand, shell in the other. Play your favorite games and show off your skills.

title: Paint Night 🎨
description: It’s an Arts and Crafts sort of day with Makenzie. Started as paint night, but we welcome all creativity. Usually, some local artists and teachers hanging out to give some advice. 🧑‍🎨

title: Trivia Night
description:
Trivia Night at Insomnia ISG
Think you’ve got the brains to win it all? Join us every Thursday at 8 PM for Trivia Night at Insomnia ISG! Gather your team, test your knowledge, and compete for bragging rights (and maybe some prizes 👀).

Sip while you play because all large specialty drinks are just $10 during trivia. 🍹✨

Bring your friends, your smarts, and your best guesses it’s the perfect midweek vibe!

title: Karaoke Night
description:
Karaoke Night at Insomnia ISG 🎤✨
Unleash your inner superstar every Friday at 8 PM! Whether you’re a shower-singer, a stage stealer, or just here for the vibes, Karaoke Night is your time to shine.

Bring your crew, pick your song, and let the good times roll because Fridays are for singing at Insomnia ISG!

title: Thursday Night Football/Gentlemens’ Night
description:
$3 kavas pour until the score starting at pregame every Thursday.

Plus Buy one get one on In-House Tapped Beverages for guys all night after 6.


Beat place to catch up with the boyz or catch a game, every Thursday. 🏈

title: Open Mic Might 🎤 🎶
description: Joel & Maeve hosts one of the best open mics of Brevard every Friday at Noble. Sign ups start early but the event gets rolling around 8PM. 🕗 \n\nStop out and show off your talent, or enjoy other local artists and those passing through town!

title: Grand Opening Celebration 🙌
description:
Celebrate the grand opening of House of Tanoa and experience a day filled with good vibes, great flavors, and community!

Enjoy unique Health & Wellness drinks, complimentary food between 4 PM and 6 PM, and 50% off all Classic Kava and Tea all day long.

Be among the first to try the premiere of the new Blue Lotus Bomb, a drink you won’t want to miss.

title: 💅 Ladies’ Night on Saturdays!
description: Meet up with the girls in a fun, welcoming, and safe environment for Buy One Get One ☝️ In-House Tapped Beverages for ladies all night. That paired with %20 off all shots, and our bumping sound system… it is Garaunteed to be whatever kind of Saturday night you ladies want it to be!

title: Dingo Bingo
description: Sundays are one of those Fundays or it should be!  Stop in and risk it for the biscuit, and play some bingo! 🥖 \n\nA fun and fast paced bingo game, 🎲 to mix up the week and gather for some laughs and joy. 🤩

title: House of Bliss Hosted Yoga 🧘
description: A perfect way to wind down 🍃 before the start of the next week. Come on in before official open, doors will be unlocked. 🔓 but take advantage of some free yoga lessons with a true yoga pro! I promise a lot of the answers can be found in breathing. ☮️

title: Saturday Night Bingo at House of Tanoa
description: Kick off your Saturday nights with weekly Bingo at House of Tanoa! Join us at 9 PM for good vibes, great drinks, and a shot at free drinks and a bar tab. Come early to claim your spot!
